gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/158)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/158)
text: خَرَجَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مِنَ الْمَسْجِدِ وَ قَدْ ضَاعَتْ دَابَّتُهُ فَقَالَ لَئِنْ رَدَّهَا اللَّهُ عَلَيَّ لَأَشْكُرَنَّ اللَّهَ حَقَّ شُكْرِهِ

قَالَ فَمَا لَبِثَ أَنْ أُتِيَ بِهَا فَقَالَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ قَائِلٌ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ أَ لَيْسَ قُلْتَ لَأَشْكُرَنَّ اللَّهَ حَقَّ شُكْرِهِ فَقَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَ لَمْ تَسْمَعْنِي قُلْتُ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Hammad Bin Usman who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> went out from the Masjid and he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> had lost his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> (riding) animal. So he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘If Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> were to Return it to me<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, I<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> will thank Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> as it is a right of thanking Him<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’.

He (the narrator) said, ‘So, it wasn’t long before they came with it. So he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’. So a sayer said to him<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>! Did you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> not say, ‘I<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> will thank Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> as it is a right of thanking Him<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’?’ So Abu Abdullah<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘Did you not listen to me<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> saying: ‘The Praise is for Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>’?’
en.sarwar: 18. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu’alla ibn Muhammad from al- Washsha’ from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman who has said the following: “Once abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) came out of the Mosque and his animal that he had ridden was missing. The Imam said, ‘If Allah will return my animal I will thank Him the way He must be thanked.’ Not long thereafter his animal was brought back. The Imam said, ‘All praise belongs to Allah.’ Someone then said, ‘May Allah keep my soul in service for your cause, did you not say, “I will thank Allah the way He must be thanked?’” The Imam said, ‘Did you not hear me saying, “All praise belongs to Allah?’””
